description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black metal body and a short, double-barrel configuration. The barrels are stacked horizontally, and the weapon features a prominent cylindrical fore-end and a robust, angular receiver. The grip is a dark reddish-brown, likely made of wood or polymer, and is shaped ergonomically for a secure hold. A visible trigger guard is present, with a squared and elongated design, and a folding or collapsible metal support extends below the grip. The shotgun is accompanied by a single red shotgun shell, which is shown separately in the images. The overall design suggests a modern, urban-use firearm optimized for maneuverability in tight spaces.
description: A compact, double-barrel tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, ergonomic grip, and a visible red shotgun shell. Features a squared trigger guard and a folding metal support under the grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the double-barrel configuration, ergonomic grip, and the separate red shotgun shell.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the red shotgun shell positioned above, with the cylindrical fore-end visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, grip, and the red shell on the right, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, the grip, and the red shotgun shell aligned with the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared and elongated trigger guard, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
